What's happening in your County
Community Collaborative for the Quincy / East Quincy Recreation Economy for Rural Communities Plan
Plumas County & RCAC invite community leaders, business owners, recreation enthusiasts, & interested residents of greater Quincy area to join the Community Collaborative Convening for the Quincy/East Quincy RERC.
Read on...
Share Your Input in a Plumas County Employment & Economic Development, Housing, and Tourism Survey
Your perspective is essential to helping the County understand current conditions and identify strategies that support housing availability and supportive services, employment, economic development, tourism, and recreation.
Read on...
CDPH Urges Vaccination as New Measles Cases Reported in Sacramento Region
Read on...
Behavioral Health Permanent Supportive Housing for Clients Virtual Meeting 3/17
Read on...
Claremont Development Project - OHV G-26 Grant Phase 1
Plumas County is applying for funds for the Claremont Development Project. The Claremont Trail System is a newly planned OHV motorized trail system located in Quincy, CA on the Plumas National Forest (PNF)
Read on...
